title: Daily Report ETL
description: ARCHETYPE: etl_pipeline. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), CRON schedule (every day at 6am), FETCH from external URL, TRANSFORM each record (not pass-through — derive a new field), SAVE to a destination table. The distinguishing signal from data_sync: the transform step is meaningful (here: extract title + compute body_length from raw posts). DO NOT build a dashboard or a multi-chart page. DO NOT add auth. Only one verification endpoint: GET /api/reports. The CORE is: `every day at '06:00 AM':` then fetch posts from 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts', for each post compute body_length = length of body, save { source_id: post.id, title: post.title, body_length } to DailyReports.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a DailyReports table:
  source_id (number)
  title
  body_length (number)
  fetched_at_date, auto

# Your scheduled job + /api/reports endpoint here
# Use: every day at '06:00 AM': ... get data from 'https://...' ... save ...
